recommendations.overview: A single mom and her child are carjacked by a bank robber who has no intention of letting them go.

recommendations.overview: When a discredited L.A. Seismologist warns of an impending 12.7 earthquake, no one takes her seriously. Now on her own, she races desperately to get her family to safety before the earthquake breaks Los Angeles apart from the mainland.
